hero.title: E-commerce Fashion Model
hero.description: Generate professional e-commerce fashion model images with AI. Create stunning on-model product shots and lifestyle presentations without expensive photoshoots or model bookings. Perfect for fashion brands scaling their product catalogs.

steps.title: Upload your clothing product
steps.description: Provide a flat lay or garment image. The AI analyzes the clothing style, fit, and aesthetic to plan the ideal model presentation.

steps.title: AI generates model presentations
steps.description: Nano Banana Pro creates professional on-model images showing your clothing worn naturally, with appropriate poses and styling.

steps.title: Add lifestyle context
steps.description: The workflow generates lifestyle settings and scenarios that complement your clothing's target market and brand positioning.

steps.title: Export e-commerce ready images
steps.description: Download high-quality model shots optimized for product listings, lookbooks, and marketing campaigns.

items.question: What is the E-commerce Fashion Model workflow?
items.answer: It's an AI-powered workflow that generates professional on-model fashion photography from clothing images, creating realistic model presentations for e-commerce without traditional photoshoots.

items.question: What types of clothing work best?
items.answer: The workflow handles all apparel types—dresses, tops, pants, outerwear, activewear, and more. It adapts the model presentation to each garment's style and fit.

items.question: Can I specify model characteristics?
items.answer: Yes. You can guide the AI regarding model appearance, poses, and styling to ensure the presentations align with your brand identity and target audience.

items.question: Are the model images realistic?
items.answer: Yes. The AI generates natural-looking model presentations with realistic fabric draping, body proportions, and lighting that meet e-commerce quality standards.

items.question: Can I generate multiple model variations?
items.answer: Absolutely. The workflow can create diverse model presentations for A/B testing or to show the same garment on different body types and in various poses.

items.question: Is this suitable for product listings?
items.answer: Yes. The output is optimized for e-commerce platforms, product detail pages, and fashion marketplaces with appropriate resolution and styling.
